message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontColor black skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor black skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8 skinparam classHeaderFontColor black skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1 skinparam classAttributeFontColor black skinparam classMethodFontColor black skinparam classMethodIconColor #4CAF50 skinparam classAttributeIconColor #FF5722 class Storage { + compressor: Compressor + encryptor: Encryptor + cacheEngine: CacheEngine + useCompression: boolean + useEncryption: boolean + useCache: boolean } class Compressor { + compress() } class Encryptor { + encrypt() } class CacheEngine { + put() } Storage --> Compressor Storage --> Encryptor Storage --> CacheEngine note top of Storage C end note note top of Compressor C end note note top of Encryptor C end note note top of CacheEngine C end note @enduml
